Chart.Additional vias: Three 1.3 mm holes for fiber optic ferrules or screws. Two optical stimulation outputs, one electrical stimulator output.
Chart.Compatible Headstages: `ONIX Headstage Ephys 64ch <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-7741.html>`_, `SPI Headstage 64ch Low Profile <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6570.html>`_, `SPI Headstage 64ch Low Profile with 3D <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6571.html>`_
